holdings.infoBox: AAEQ is an equity ETF with a total of 332 individual holdings. The top holdings are Apple stock at 8.38%, NVIDIA at 7.57%, Microsoft at 5.36%, Alphabet at 4.09%, and Amazon.com at 3.72%.

overview.description: The Alpha Architect US Equity 2 ETF (AAEQ) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund offered initial investors a way to diversify taxable holdings via a 351 exchange. The actively managed fund seeks to provide market-cap weighted exposure to broad US equities. AAEQ was launched on Dec 9, 2025 and is issued by Alpha Architect.
